nodes.label: SCT Ontology Operating Principles
nodes.rationale: Five operating principles: treat HVDC logistics as default context, answer from approved evidence, keep high-risk decisions behind AMBER/ZERO gates, preserve human approval for mutations, validate consistency through Golden Q&A regression.

nodes.label: CostGuard (Invoice Delta Thresholds)
nodes.rationale: Delta formula: (DraftAmount - StandardAmount) / StandardAmount * 100. PASS: abs <= 2%, WARN: 2.01-5%, HIGH: 5.01-10%, CRITICAL: >10%.
